report.narrative: Stocks closed lower with SPY -0.31% and QQQ -0.36%. Composite sentiment -18 (Neutral). The tape is being driven mainly by sector rotation, market breadth (a/d), qqq / mega-cap tech. VIX at 14.89 (-0.23%). Environment read: favor defined-risk spreads. Leadership came from Financials; Communication lagged. Today's standouts: AMD +2.65%, JPM +1.92%. Laggards: PLTR -6.98%, NFLX -5.82%. Carrying NFLX as the top idea into tomorrow (7.2/10).
